svg.title: Smart Ground UI — Design System Audit
svg.desc: Overview of design system issues, token fragmentation, and component scores
svg.text: Smart Ground UI — Design System Audit
3 disconnected token systems · 80% of colors hardcoded
Button.vue exists but ignored · 5+ duplicate button styles
No FormField component · inconsistent focus rings & spacing
StatusDot vs status-badge CSS vs Badge.vue — no shared language
base.css (Inter) overridden by main.css · Werfer fonts not loaded
Mixed px / rem units · no skeleton states
rem in SmartBoxDetailView, px everywhere else · base ≠ 16px
No shared tokens · Admin UI uses none of these
